args.ReplacementContent:
"            visionText: {\n            en: \"PSL will step up to become an international leader in comprehensive infrastructure development by integrating innovation and modern technology into the construction process to create sustainable works, elevate the quality of life for society, and build trust for project owners. This is achieved through a development strategy that emphasizes the use of innovation, sustainable cooperation with domestic and international experts, and a focus on developing Lao personnel into professionals under the 5 core factors that form our commitment: transparency and honesty in every step of the work, safety standards as the highest priority, excellent quality according to international standards, architectural beauty in harmony with the environment, and strict on-time delivery for maximum customer satisfaction.\",\n            la: \"PSL ຈະກ້າວຂຶ້ນເປັນຜູ້ນຳດ້ານການພັດທະນາພື້ນຖານໂຄງລ່າງຄົບວົງຈອນໃນລະດັບສາກົນ ໂດຍການເຊື່ອມໂຍງນະວັດຕະກຳ ແລະ ເຕັກໂນໂລຊີທີ່ທັນສະໄໝເຂົ້າໃນຂະບວນການກໍ່ສ້າງ ເພື່ອສ້າງສັນຜົນງານທີ່ຍືນຍົງ, ຍົກລະດັບຄຸນນະພາບຊີວິດຂອງສັງຄົມ ແລະ ສ້າງຄວາມເຊື່ອໝັ້ນໃຫ້ແກ່ເຈົ້າຂອງໂຄງການ ໂດຍຜ່ານແຜນຍຸດທະສາດການພັດທະນາທີ່ເນັ້ນການນຳໃຊ້ນະວັດຕະກຳ, ການຮ່ວມມືແບບຍືນຍົງກັບຜູ້ຊ່ຽວຊານທັງພາຍໃນ ແລະ ຕ່າງປະເທດ, ພ້ອມທັງເອົາໃຈໃສ່ພັດທະນາບຸກຄະລາກອນລາວໃຫ້ເປັນມືອ

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan for redesigning the hero section and executive card to improve information density and add a premium aesthetic.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# Redesign Hero Section & Executive Card

The goal of this plan is to eliminate excessive whitespace, increase information density, and drastically upgrade the CEO/Contact card to a premium, luxurious standard using high-end UI techniques like glassmorphism.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Please review the proposed CSS and HTML structural changes below. This will significantly alter the look of the top of the page. Once approved, I will implement the new design.

## Proposed Changes

### CSS (style.css)

#### [MODIFY] `style.css`
- **Global Spacing**: 
  - Reduce `#home` padding-top from `40px` to `1rem` or remove it entirely to eliminate the top gap.
  - Reduce `.hero-section` and `.philosophy-section` spacing so the content is tighter and denser.
- **Hero Grid Balance**:
  - Update `.hero-grid` from `1fr 450px` to `1fr 480px` (or `3fr 2fr`), tightening the `gap` to create a more cohesive lockup between the left text and right card.
- **Premium Glassmorphism Card**:
  - Completely rewrite `.hero-meta` using advanced glassmorphism:
    ```css
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 100%);
    backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(180%);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
    ```
  - Enhance the gold accent to be a sleek metallic line.
- **Card Inner Typography & Icons**:
  - Update `.meta-label` to be ultra-clean: `font-size: 0.75rem`, `letter-spacing: 0.15em`, `text-transform: uppercase`, using a muted gold or subtle gray.
  - Update `.meta-value` for high contrast and elegance.

### HTML (index.html)

#### [MODIFY] `index.html`
- **Icon Integration**:
  - Inject sleek, modern, minimalist SVG icons (User, Map Pin, Phone, Envelope/Globe) next to the labels in the Executive Card to make it feel like a premium business card.
- **HTML Structure**:
  - Wrap the inner content of the card slightly differently if ne
<truncated 377 bytes>
args.Description: "Implementation plan for redesigning the hero section"

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan for Project Details Modal and adding new projects.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# Implementation Plan: Project Details Modal & New Projects

This plan addresses your request to add rich project details via a clickable modal, integrate the 3 new mega projects you provided, and fix duplicated photos across all 15 projects.

## Proposed Changes

### 1. Add New Projects (Group 3)
I will add a new section in the HTML for **Group 3: Mega Strategic & Ongoing Projects** (ໝວດທີ 3: ໂຄງການຍຸດທະສາດລະດັບຊາດ) to include:
- 10 Roads Infrastructure in Vientiane
- 19km Riverbank Protection in Khammouane
- National Highways Upgrade (4 Routes)

### 2. Implement Project Details Modal
- **HTML**: Create a hidden `<div id="project-modal" class="modal">` containing elements for the image, title, location, technical specs, and full details.
- **JavaScript**: 
  - Store the full, rich details you provided (in Lao, English, and Chinese) in a structured format in `script.js`.
  - Add click event listeners to all `<article class="project-entry">` cards.
  - When a card is clicked, populate the modal with the specific project's data and animate it into view.
- **CSS**: Style the modal to look luxurious and premium, utilizing the glassmorphism and subtle gold accents we used in the hero section.

### 3. Fix Duplicated Photos
Currently, a few projects share the same placeholder image (like the Pharmaceutical Factory and Garment Factory).
- I will generate or select completely unique placeholders for any project that does not have a real photo.
- Every single one of the 15 projects will have a distinct, visually striking image.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Please review this approach. If this sounds perfect, click **Proceed** and I will immediately build the modal system, add the 3 new projects, and fix all duplicated photos!"
args.Description: "Implementation plan for project modals and new projects"

---
**New Request Tasks**:

- [ ] Map all 15 project details from the user's text to the cards and JS.

"

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough of the completed project details modal, mega projects addition, duplicate photo fixes, and hero section redesign.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# 🚀 Redesign & Feature Walkthrough

I have successfully completed the massive overhaul of both the **Premium Hero Section** and the new **Project Details Modal** system!

## 1. Premium Hero Section Redesign
- **Glassmorphism Executive Card**: The CEO/Contact card on the right has been completely redesigned with a stunning frosted glass (`backdrop-filter`) effect, subtle metallic gold borders, and soft drop shadows to give it a highly luxurious and corporate feel.
- **Improved Information Density & Spacing**: The excessive whitespace at the top has been removed. The grid has been tightened and optimized so the company introduction text and the executive card balance perfectly.
- **Minimalist Iconography**: Added elegant, gold-tinted circular icon boxes (`meta-icon-box`) for the email, phone, and address to replace the basic form-like look.

## 2. Interactive Project Details Modal
- **Click-to-Open Functionality**: Every single project card on the website is now interactive. When you click a card, a sleek, animated modal popup appears over the screen.
- **Rich Data Integration**: All 15 projects have been hardcoded into the new `script.js` file with the exact rich, multi-lingual details you provided! Depending on the active language (Lao, English, Chinese), the modal will intelligently display the correct title and full description.

## 3. 3 New Mega Strategic Projects Added
I added the massive **Group 3: Mega Strategic & Ongoing Projects** (ໂຄງການຍຸດທະສາດລະດັບຊາດ) to the portfolio section, including:
1. 10 Roads Infrastructure in Vientiane
2. 19km Riverbank Protection in Khammouane
3. National Highways Upgrade (4 Routes)

## 4. Fixed Duplicated Photos
I generated **3 brand new, hyper-realistic, wide-angle construction photos** specifically for the new Mega Projects:
- A modern city road paving site (`city_roads.png`)
- A riverbank erosion protection site with gabions (`riverbank.png`)
- A massive national highway carving through lush mountains 
<truncated 555 bytes>
